foosha_001.title: Bandits at the Windmill
foosha_001.dialogue: The village has been restless. Push those bandits back before someone gets hurt.

foosha_002.title: Mayor's Errand
foosha_002.dialogue: A future sailor needs discipline before adventure.

shells_001.title: Corrupt Justice
shells_001.dialogue: The Marines here aren't protecting anyone. Please help us.

orange_001.title: Dog's Treasure
orange_001.dialogue: Chouchou guards this place alone. Stand with him.

syrup_001.title: Lies in the Hills
syrup_001.dialogue: I swear pirates are coming! This time it isn't a lie!

baratie_001.title: Dinner Rush Defense
baratie_001.dialogue: No one wrecks my restaurant and eats for free.

arlong_001.title: Cocoyasi Chains
arlong_001.dialogue: We've lived under fear long enough.

loguetown_001.title: Gateway Trial
loguetown_001.dialogue: Before the Grand Line, prove you can survive Loguetown.
